instructions: Fill every operator_evidence field and every check ok/evidence/observed_at/url field from a real logged-in production smoke run. Every check URL must be under https://app.manut.xyz and must not be a public health/API probe, auth page, or Sign up page. Do not mark checks passing from assumptions.

cloudflare_route_evidence.note: Record Cloudflare production-route evidence, for example cf-ray/cdn-cgi trace captured during the authenticated run.

checks.label: User can log in and reach the authenticated app shell.
Authenticated session survives a hard refresh.
Workspace sidebar renders expected workspace context.
Project list loads for the authenticated workspace.
A non-critical work item can be created.
The non-critical work item can be edited.
The non-critical work item can be deleted or archived.
Attachment or logo upload succeeds and resolves through uploads.
A representative live update propagates to another view or session.
The authorized admin route loads or correctly denies non-admin users.
A public space route loads without authenticated-session leakage.
